## Testing

## Security and privacy

<!-- External data sharing, credentials, logging, storage, input validation, and consent. -->

- [ ] No credentials, `.env`, private customer data, or unrelated files are included.
- [ ] New external calls are documented and tested with mocks or a sandbox.
- [ ] Completed and planned capabilities are described accurately.

## Review checklist

- [ ] Existing local/mock mode still works without an API key.
- [ ] Behavior changes have tests.
- [ ] Documentation matches the implementation.
- [ ] Backward compatibility was considered.
